caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green t-shirt with a bold graphic and text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT," along with a cap and headphones. The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to audio recording, as evidenced by the professional microphone setup. Behind him, there is a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs, possibly of people or events, adding a personal touch to the space. To the right, a clothing store display is visible, including mannequins dressed in various outfits and racks of clothes, suggesting that the recording might be taking place in a multi-purpose area or near a retail environment. The man seems focused and engaged, indicating he is actively participating in the recording session.
